title: Arkanian jellyfish

The '''Arkanian jellyfish''' was a type of [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] [[Jellyfish/Legends|jellyfish]] native to the frozen [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]].<ref name="TEC" />

The [[DZ-70 fugitive tracker droid]]s, used during the rule of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], had several arms that dangled like the tentacles of an Arkanian jellyfish.<ref name="EGD" /> In another instance, the [[Oswaft]], a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] gigantic species from the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]], resembled a cross between a [[Corellian sea ray]] and an Arkanian jellyfish.<ref name="TEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Arkanian jellyfish was first mentioned in the [[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|second issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Freedon Nadd Uprising'']] comic series. A comparison with the Arkanian jellyfish was used in a caption box to describe the debilitated state of the [[Sith sorcerer]] [[Ommin/Legends|Ommin]].<ref name="TJ">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]]</ref> Furthermore, an Arkanian jellyfish was used as a point of comparison in other literary sources, ''[[The Essential Guide to Droids]]'' and ''[[The Essential Chronology (real-world book)|The Essential Chronology]]''. Despite this, the species was never examined on its own, and in every instance its description was defined through comparisons to other entities.<ref name="EGD" /><ref name="TEC" />
